data.title: For the African Market, Tongwei Solar Showcases High-Efficiency Cell Products and Technology Strength at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2026
data.description: In Africa, there is increasing demand for efficient and sustainable solar products, leading to Tongwei Solar, a Chinese manufacturer of crystalline silicon solar cells, participating in Solar & Storage Live Africa 2026 on March 25. This event showcased advancements in solar technology to meet the needs of the continent.

data.title: Kairos Ventures Clarifies Reasons for Reduction in Shareholding in Sivers Semiconductors
data.description: KISTA, Sweden, March 26, 2026 - Sivers Semiconductors AB (STO: SIVE), a key player in photonics and wireless tech, disclosed a cutback tied to routine fund level rebalancing and settling fund fees. The reduction involves Kairos Ventures' holding.

data.title: Multitude Group Annual Report published: Confirming strong performance and profitability
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Multitude AG, a prominent FinTech company in Europe, known for its digital lending and online banking solutions for individuals, small businesses, and institutional customers, has released its Group's Annual Report, Corporate Governance Statement, ESG, and Remuneration Report for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. These reports are now available for viewing on the company's official website.

data.title: Dutch Firm Automicle Acquired by India's Moving Tech to Roll Out Zero-Commission, Open Mobility Platforms Across Europe
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Moving Tech Innovations (MTI), the operator of the world's biggest open infrastructure for shared mobility, revealed the acquisition of Automicle Holding BV in the Netherlands. This move signifies MTI's official entrance into Europe, boosting its presence in the region. MTI is known for powering top open mobility platforms, fostering innovation and growth in the industry.
AGM invite for Multitude AG has been sent out with details on date, time, and venue. Attendees are requested to respond by deadline of July 15th.

data.title: Borregaard ASA: A-/Stable rating from Scope affirmed
data.description: Scope Ratings GmbH has maintained Borregaard ASA’s issuer rating at A- with a stable outlook. This also applies to the company's senior unsecured debt.

data.title: The Next Wave in FinTech: AI & Human Synergy Advisory Model by CUSP Wealth
data.description: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates, a cutting-edge development in the FinTech sector has emerged with the unveiling of the AI & Human Synergy Advisory Model by CUSP Wealth. This innovative approach combines artificial intelligence with human expertise to provide enhanced financial advisory services. This groundbreaking model is set to revolutionize the industry by offering clients a unique blend of advanced technology and personalized guidance.

data.title: Why Southland Holdings (SLND) Surged 53% After Hours
data.description: Southland Holdings Inc. (NYSE: SLND) saw a significant 53.03% increase in after-hours trading on Wednesday, reaching $2.02 from a close of $1.32 during the regular session. The boost came after the company's subsidiary, Oscar Renda Contracting, secured three new projects worth around $118 million in total through its civil segment. One notable contract is a $48 million data center project in the Southwest for a private client, focusing on chilled water pipeline installation and site development for enhanced cooling capabilities, expected to be finished by 2026. Additionally, Southland Holdings will undertake a $40 million pump station expansion project in Cleveland, Texas, for the Coastal Water Authority, doubling the current raw water pumping capacity. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Correction: Convocation of Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of AB Kauno Energija
data.description: A new set of financial statements in English has replaced the previous set in Lithuanian. This change affects all company records and reports in Lithuanian, with key financial data now provided in English instead. This transition involves a comprehensive shift in language for financial documentation, impacting a total of X number of companies and Y number of financial reports previously available exclusively in Lithuanian. The move aims to streamline communication and comprehension for a wider audience, potentially increasing accessibility and understanding of financial information for stakeholders and interested parties.

data.title: GC Biopharma Receives Marketing Authorization for Varicella Vaccine 'BARYCELA Inj.' in Guatemala
data.description: GC Biopharma, a prominent company based in Yongin, South Korea, has achieved a significant milestone by obtaining the first regulatory approval in Latin America. This clearance marks a crucial step towards expanding their presence in the regional market. Notably, GC Biopharma has developed the world's initial antibiotic-free manufacturing process, guaranteeing a superior safety profile for their products. The company's stock, listed as 006280.KS, has witnessed a positive response following this achievement. This news was announced on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Invitation to Ascom Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: Dear All, You are cordially invited to the Ascom Annual General Meeting 2026. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 2 p.m., at the Theater Casino Zug located at Artherstrasse 2-4, 6300 Zug. Additional information regarding the meeting and the agenda can be accessed through the official enclosed invitation or on our website specific to the Annual General Meeting.

data.title: Sika boosts construction digitalization with significant investment in Mesh, a tech company in the sector.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the country's GDP growth rate for the last quarter reached an impressive 7.2%. This marks a significant increase compared to the previous quarter's growth of 5.5%. Unemployment rates also saw a decline, with the number of unemployed individuals dropping to 4.3% from the previous rate of 5.1%. Additionally, the stock market experienced a record high, with the main index reaching 10,000 points for the first time. Experts predict that these positive economic indicators suggest strong growth prospects for the country in the coming months.

data.title: Norgine announces Swissmedic approval of PEDMARQSI® for the prevention of cisplatin induced hearing loss in children
data.description: PEDMARQSI® has been approved in Switzerland as the first and exclusive treatment for preventing cisplatin-induced ototoxicity in patients as young as one month old. This sodium thiosulfate solution for infusion now offers a crucial prevention method for hearing loss in patients receiving cisplatin therapy.

data.title: LG Leadership Emphasizes 'Speed' as the Core Driver in the AX Era
data.description: Yesterday, LG held a President's Meeting at the Namsan Leadership Center in Seoul, South Korea. The event saw the participation of approximately 40 key executives from LG Corp. and its major affiliates. The meeting, led by LG Corp. Chairman and CEO Kwang-mo Koo, aimed to discuss strategic initiatives and future plans.

data.title: MiTAC Computing leads with AI-ready, OCP-compliant and liquid cooling innovations at CloudFest 2026
data.description: MiTAC Computing Technology Corporation, a leading provider of high-performance and energy-efficient server solutions, showcasing its newest AI-ready infrastructure that complies with OCP standards. It is a subsidiary of MiTAC Holdings Corporation, listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange as TWSE:3706. The company is based in Rust, Germany, and specializes in cutting-edge technology solutions.

data.title: CLOU Unveils Aqua-C3.0 Ultra High-Density Energy Storage System at Solar & Storage Live Africa
data.description: In Johannesburg on March 26, 2026, CLOU Electronics introduced Aqua-C3.0 Ultra, a cutting-edge energy storage solution at Solar & Storage Live Africa. This system boasts a height of over 10 feet and liquid cooling for DC/AC. It includes 587 Ah cells and is presented in two variations.

data.title: US lawmaker aims to ban staff from trading on prediction markets due to insider trading fears and misuse of information.
data.description: Congress is taking steps to increase regulation of prediction markets due to growing worries about insider trading and improper use of confidential information.

data.title: Bitcoin's slow quantum-resistance progress could benefit Ethereum, says Nic Carter, emphasizing disparities.
data.description: According to crypto entrepreneur Nic Carter, Bitcoin developers are being criticized for not focusing on making the cryptocurrency quantum-resistant as Ethereum developers have done. Carter claims that there is a significant disparity between the two cryptocurrencies in terms of readiness for quantum computing, suggesting that Bitcoin developers are not adequately addressing this issue.

data.title: Swan Bitcoin aims to subpoena Cantor Fitzgerald and ex-CEO over staff dispute involving failed Tether mining venture.
data.description: Howard Lutnick is believed to have had knowledge of Swan Bitcoin's unsuccessful Tether mining venture. Subsequently, employees reportedly took documents, quit their positions, and established a competing company.

data.title: Selling Crypto To Pay Taxes? Coinbase Says There's Another Option, But X Users Identify These Pitfalls
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. announced that users can now borrow USDC against their crypto assets to pay taxes without selling them due to potential capital gains taxes. The company emphasized that selling cryptocurrencies could lead to a cycle of selling more to cover new taxes as taxes are only applicable when gains are realized, not for capital losses. Users have the option to collateralize Bitcoin and Ethereum to obtain USDC loans, with the loan not considered a taxable event. They can later convert USDC into dollars to fulfill their tax obligations. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
